calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helen Milowe for James Reuben (Executor).

The Court stated that there was a possiblity of sanctions for making a preliminary distribution without Court authorization. Ms. Milowe stated that she did not realize that the distribution to the Arturo Lopez Perez Fundacion was going to be treated as a distribution and that she thought of it as a settlement of a claim. In addition, Ms. Milowe stated that no general power of appointment was made, that the Trust was never funded, that it was the intent of the Decedent that it would be funded after his Wife's death but that he never made it back to this country after he became ill, and that there was no inpependent purpose for the Trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Continued To Jun-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Regarding Ownership Of Proceeds Of Sale Of Necklace
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 291355 (Trust for the benefit of Fundacion Arthuro Lopez-Perez).

Appearances: M. Armon Cooper for the Fundacion Arthuro Lopez-Perez. Helen Milowe for James Reuben.

Ms. Milowe reported that the IRS would allow a $555,000.00 charitable dedcution from the sale of the necklace and stated that the balance of $15,000.00 would remain in the estate for pending expenses. In addition, she stated that she did not have written consent from the Beneficiaries and that distribution would have to be done when the petition for final distribution was filed. Furthermore, Ms. Milowe stated that there may be a delay in closing the estate and requested an order from the Court allowing distribution of the $555,000.00 of which $225,000.00 had already been distributed. A proposed order was submitted. The Court took the matters under submission.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case #291335 (Trust for Fundacion Arthuro Lopez Perez).

Appearances: Helen Molowe for and with James Reuben (Executor). Armon Cooper for Fundacion Arthuro Lopez Perez ("FALP").

The parties presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court directed the Parties to meet outside and try to work out the matter. The matter was continued to November 18, 2008 for status.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helen Milowe for the Petitioner/Executor.

The Petition for Order Regarding Ownership Of Real Property was granted, (order for the same signed in open court). The Petition For Confirmation Of Sale of the 1333-1335 Kearney St/34 Sonoma St. was taken off calendar. Ms. Milowe was directed to file an amended petition.
